title: About Isaac
content:
A young lad breaking through limits in technology, dealing extensively with both circuit design and computer programming.

I create a variety of mobile and web applications for a myriad of purposes, ranging from mobile apps that deal with bookings at national events to websites that use artificial intelligence to identify meme formats. All for my relentless passion for and pursuit of knowledge acquisition.

I have presented my projects to industry professionals at Amazon, Google, DSTA Singapore and more. With the knowledge and experience I'm gaining, I am always excited to share my ideas and skills with others to push them to their fullest potential.
